event5.text: Lütfen bunun başka bir otomatik röle yankısı olmadığını söyle.

event16.text: Baş Mühendis. ECHO Yörünge Araştırma İstasyonu.

event3.text: Ölü uzaydan sürünerek çıkan bir yabancı yardım isteseydi ben de şüphelenirdim.

event5.text: İstasyon büyük bir sistem arızası yaşadı.

event10.text: Aylardır aldığım ilk gerçek sinyal sensin.

event1.text: Güzel. Bilgi hâlâ sana verebileceğim bir şey.

event3.text: Hâlâ erişebildiğim tek mürettebat kaydını gönderiyorum.

event4.title: MÜRETTEBAT KAYDI: ETHAN HALE
event4.content: DR. ETHAN HALE — BAŞ MÜHENDİS. RÖLE BAKIM YETKİLENDİRMESİ: 7391. DURUM: AKTİF.
event4.caption: Kurtarılan kimlik ve bakım parçası.

event6.text: Bu bakım kodu röle kapısını hâlâ açabilir.

event8.text: Ve evet, az önce sana kendi şifremi gönderdiğimin farkındayım.

event10.text: Lütfen bunu bugün yaşanan en utanç verici şey yapma.

backgroundEvent11.text: [ARKA PLAN TARAMASI: ZAYIF İKİNCİL SİNYAL TESPİT EDİLDİ]

etkinlik6.metin: ya da beş dakika önce kazara şifreyi sana verdim.

etkinlik11.altyazi: Hale'in kıyafet kamerasından kurtarılan koridor görüntüsü.

etkinlik11.metin: Hayır. Üzgünüm. Bu aptalca bir söz oldu.

etkinlik13.metin: Görmezden gelme. Sadece bunun yüzünden paniğe kapılma.

etkinlik15.metin: İstasyon sistemleri kararsız ve röle üzerinde bir şey asalak olarak yaşıyor.

etkinlik1.icerik: Kapı 12, 21:17'de açıldı. Manuel geçersiz kılma kabul edildi. Operatör kimliği gizlendi.
21:20'de vaka bildirildi. Yaralanma sebebi: dekompresyon travması. Konum: Kapı 12 erişim koridoru.

etkinlik10.metin: Bir uyarı alarmı. Kapı 12. Biri adımı bağırıyor.

etkinlik4.metin: Kapı 12. Tıbbi travma. Manuel geçersiz kılma.

etkinlik8.metin: Karartma sırasında çoğu arşiv sektörü bozuldu.

etkinlik13.metin: Ya da en azından gitmiş olmalıydılar.

etkinlik1.icerik:
İstasyon arşiv sektörünün kurtarılan bakım haritası.

Sektör A: Birincil röle arşivi
Sektör B: Bozulmuş personel önbelleği
Sektör C: Acil durum kanalı kayıtları

etkinlik3.metin: Sektör C. Acil durum kanalı kayıtları. Bunların hâlâ indekslenmiş olmaması gerekiyordu.

etkinlik1.metin: İçeride hâlâ bir şeyler kalmış olabilir. Eğer arşiv kurtulduysa, cevaplar da kurtulmuştur. Bu işin rahatlatıcı versiyonu. Daha az rahatlatıcı olanı ise birinin bunların hayatta kalmasını istemiş olması.

etkinlik3.icerik:
[ŞİFRELİ ARŞİV PARÇASI]

Arşiv Anahtarı İpucu: ALPHA

Durum: Kilitli

etkinlik1.icerik:
21:14 Kapı 12 açıldı.
21:15 Tanımlanamayan hareket tespit edildi.
21:17 Güvenlik geçersiz kılma kabul edildi.
21:19 Sinyal kesintisi.

etkinlik6.metin: O kaydın olmaması gerekiyor. Ve sormadan önce, evet, kulağa ne kadar korkunç geldiğini biliyorum.

etkinlik1.metin: Çünkü o arşivi ben sildim. Ya da öyle sanıyordum.
Bazı kayıtların hayatta kalması asla amaçlanmamıştı. Ve bunun hayatta kaldığını düşünmeye başlıyorum, bilerek yapılmış.

etkinlik3.metin: O figür... açı yanlış ama kıyafet ana hatları tanıdık. Kanıtların benden daha iyi hafızaya sahip olmasından nefret ediyorum.

etkinlik1.icerik:
Geçersiz Kılma Kullanıcısı: SANSÜRLENDİ
Yetkilendirme: GEÇERLİ
Kaynak: BİLİNMEYEN

etkinlik3.metin: Yetkilendirme geçerli. Kaynak bilinmeyen. Güvenlik kayıtları böyle çalışmaz.

etkinlik0.icerik:
Acil Durum Yedek Kanalı

7.14 MHz

Sadece birincil iletişim sistemleri çökerse kullanın.

etkinlik2.metin: 7.14 MHz. Hayır, hayır, hayır. O kanala dokunmuyoruz.

etkinlik1.metin: Beni dinle. Bundan sonra ne olursa olsun... 7.14 kanalını açma. Sana ne vadettiği umurumda değil.
Çünkü başka biri daha dinliyor. Ve cevap verirse... geri cevap verme.
Güzel. O zaman bizim yaptığımız hatayı yapma. Yedek kanalların daha güvenli olduğunu sanıyorduk. Güvenliğin yalan söylediğinde çok gürültülü olabileceği ortaya çıktı.

event4.text: I need you to understand something before we go anywhere near it.

event10.text: Unfortunately, space has made me very dramatic.

event1.title: PERSONNEL FILE: ETHAN HALE
event1.content:
DR. ETHAN HALE
ROLE: CHIEF ENGINEER
ASSIGNMENT: ORBITAL RESEARCH STATION ECHO
STATUS: DECEASED
TIME OF DEATH: 21:20
LOCATION: DOOR 12 ACCESS CORRIDOR
event1.caption: Recovered personnel record from corrupted station cache.

event10.text: Please let it be the system.
I really wish it had said something less horrible.

choice1.text: WE DON'T HAVE TO TALK ABOUT IT.

event6.text: If that file is real, then something is using my signal.

event8.text: And I don't like sharing. Especially with ghosts.

event1.title: AUTOPSY FRAGMENT: HALE
event1.content:
SUBJECT: ETHAN HALE
CAUSE OF DEATH: DECOMPRESSION TRAUMA
LOCATION: DOOR 12 ACCESS CORRIDOR
RECOVERY STATUS: BODY NOT RECOVERED
NOTE: VITALS TERMINATED AT 21:20
event1.caption: Recovered emergency medical fragment.

event1.title: TIMELINE CONFLICT
event1.content:
21:14 Door 12 opened.
21:17 Security override accepted.
21:20 Ethan Hale declared deceased.

Conflict: Active communication signature matches Ethan Hale after recorded time of death.
event1.caption: Automated timeline conflict report.

backgroundEvent2.text: He is not the only one still talking.

event6.text: There was another voice on the emergency channel.

event4.text: If the signal repeats, we'll know it is not random.

event6.text: And if it is random, I will happily apologize to the terrifying space radio.

puzzle0.title: SIGNAL TUNING
puzzle0.description: Tune the emergency frequency until the hidden transmission locks.

event0.title: EMERGENCY AUDIO LOG
event0.content:
Signal heavily distorted.
Frequency mismatch detected.
Recommended action: manual signal tuning required.
event0.caption: Distorted emergency audio packet from channel 7.14.
event0.message: [EMERGENCY AUDIO LOG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: If you can tune it, do it now.

event9.text: And if Ethan Hale is on your other channel, you need to stop listening to him.

event1.text: You are speaking with Ethan Hale, aren't you?

event8.text: No. I'm done letting you speak first.

event0.title: SURVIVOR FEED
event0.caption: Recovered emergency camera frame. A woman is visible near a damaged relay console.

event6.text: Which is more than I can say for Hale.

event4.text: And whatever is pretending to be Hale.

event1.text: If we're going to survive this, you need to know who we were.

event4.text: ECHO wasn't run by one person.

event6.text: No matter how much Hale enjoyed sounding like he owned the place.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
event0.caption: Official crew manifest recovered from the station database.

event3.text: He called himself Head of Not Dying.

event5.text: Rivera managed logistics. If something moved on this station, Rivera knew where it came from, where it was going, and who was about to complain about it.

event7.text: Park and Owens maintained the lower sectors.

event12.text: Park pretended he did. Owens called him a liar every morning.

event0.title: CREW PHOTO
event0.caption: Official crew photograph recovered from station records.

event1.text: I used to hate that photo.

event3.text: Grant blinked. Rivera refused to smile. Hale looked like he was about to fire the camera.

event6.text: But something about it always bothered me.
There were six bunks. Six suits. Six oxygen licenses.

event8.text: On a station like ECHO, you don't accidentally bring an extra person.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST V2
event0.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
07 █████████
event0.caption: Corrupted personnel manifest recovered from hidden archive layer.

event4.text: And that's the part that scares me.

event6.text: I remember every person on this station.

event8.text: Even the ones I wish I could forget.

event6.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE

puzzle0.title: MEMORY RECONSTRUCTION
puzzle0.description: Search previous records and identify the missing crew member.

event3.text: He said you already saw the name.

event6.text: Then the answer must be somewhere in the archives.

event8.text: And I really hate when the archives start acting smug.

event1.title: CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT
event1.content:
CREW MEMBER #07
STATUS: REDACTED
SURNAME: V---
event1.caption: Partially recovered crew record from corrupted personnel database.
event1.message: [CORRUPTED MANIFEST FRAGMENT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event5.text: I don't remember anyone with a V surname on ECHO.

event4.text: That file was deleted for a reason.

event6.text: And no, before Maya says it, not because I'm secretly dramatic.

event0.title: MAINTENANCE LOG
event0.content:
Relay inspection completed.
Signal bleed detected on emergency carrier.
Manual reset recommended.

Signed: N. Voss
event0.caption: Recovered relay maintenance entry with partial signature.

event4.text: No. I would remember that signature.

event3.text: Crew seven. Surname Voss. First initial N.

event1.title: NOAH VOSS
event1.content:
NOAH VOSS
ROLE: COMMUNICATIONS SPECIALIST
CLEARANCE LEVEL: OMEGA
STATUS: UNKNOWN
TRANSFER STATUS: DENIED
event1.caption: Reconstructed personnel profile from fragmented archive records.
event1.message: [NOAH VOSS PROFILE ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event6.text: I know I keep saying that.

event8.text: I would love for one thing today to be possible.

event1.text: Because Noah Voss never boarded the station.

event4.text: His transfer request was denied weeks before launch.

event6.text: I remember Rivera making a joke about it.

event8.text: Something about communications specialists being terrible at communicating with HR.

event6.text: I was the first voice you heard.

event0.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - ETHAN HALE
event0.content:
Subject: Ethan Hale
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject demonstrates strong command resilience under isolation pressure.

event0.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - MAYA CHEN
event0.content:
Subject: Maya Chen
Status: Stable
Risk Level: Low
Recommendation: Active Duty Approved
Evaluator Note: Subject shows high pattern-recognition ability and repeated resistance to memory suppression protocols.

event1.title: PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION - NOAH VOSS
event1.content:
FILE NOT FOUND

Archive slot exists.
Record body removed.
Deletion authority: UNKNOWN

event0.title: EVALUATION INDEX
event0.content:
Created: 12 April
Last Modified: 14 April
Verification Status: Valid
Linked Incident: Alpha
Incident Alpha Date: 11 April
Index Conflict: RECORD CREATED AFTER INCIDENT

event4.text: Incident Alpha happened on April 11. I remember the alarm. I remember Hale shouting over the channel.

event5.text: Those evaluations did not exist before Alpha.

event6.text: Someone wrote us clean after everything went wrong.

event1.text: Maya, stop. You do not know what you are looking at.

event3.text: Those records were buried for a reason. And before you make a joke about my leadership skills, this is not me being dramatic. This is me trying to keep us alive.

backgroundEvent3.text: No. He is afraid you will find out who is missing.

event1.text: Good. Then help me uncover the truth. And if Hale starts sounding calm again, remember this moment. Calm is his emergency voice.
You made the right decision. Some truths are dangerous. Not because they hurt to know. Because once you know them, something knows you know.

event7.text: Discrepancy detected: one person removed from manifest. One person removed from recovered photo.

event3.text: A life support module. It's still transmitting. Please tell me the universe is done being weird for one minute.

event2.title: POD MANIFEST
event2.content:
Occupant: UNKNOWN
Status: CRITICAL
Life Support: 23%
Signal Origin: External emergency pod
Beacon Integrity: unstable
Manifest Link: corrupted

event1.text: We can still reach it. Not easily. Not safely. Honestly, not in any way that makes my survival instincts happy. But there is someone inside.

event3.text: Whatever is inside that pod is not worth the risk. And before Maya says I sound heartless, I know exactly how I sound. That is why you should listen.

event1.text: Good. Thank you. If this gets us killed, I will write a very passive-aggressive apology note in the afterlife.
A rational decision. Not a kind one. But rational.

backgroundEvent2.text: There is still someone breathing in there, Hale.

event1.text: Image quality degraded. Partial suit identifier recovered.

event3.text: That suit belonged to Noah Voss. His psych file was missing because there was not supposed to be a file anymore. Voss died before Alpha.
I saw the body myself. And if that thing is using his suit ID, then it is not asking for help. It is baiting us.

backgroundEvent3.text: Don't leave me in the dark again.

event3.text: Wait Task Active: RESCUE THE POD
Beacon lock unstable. Pod trajectory is drifting.

event1.text: Life support is dropping. We do not have much time. And before anyone asks, no, I do not have a calm version of that sentence.

event0.title: RESCUE ROUTE MAP
event0.content:
ROUTE A
Short Route
High Radiation
Estimated Arrival: Fast
Crew Risk: Severe

ROUTE B
Long Route
Low Radiation
Estimated Arrival: Delayed
Crew Risk: Moderate
Life Support Risk: Severe

backgroundEvent2.text: Fast route. Terrible route. Very us.

backgroundEvent3.text: Keep moving. Do not stop in the exposed corridor.
Not for whoever is in that pod.

backgroundEvent5.text: Do not let Hale open it first.

event1.text: I cannot identify the occupant. The scan keeps folding over itself, like the image is trying not to show us a face.
Do not open the pod. I am not asking.
The pod was empty. No body. No blood. No suit. Just frost on the inside of the glass.
Rescue team has reached emergency pod exterior.

event0.title: POD OCCUPANT FEED
event0.caption: Cryostasis pod interior. Face obscured. Suit identifier visible: NV-08.

event2.title: OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN
event2.content:
NAME: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: ALIVE
HEARTBEAT: DETECTED
NEURAL ACTIVITY: LOW BUT PRESENT
CRYOSTASIS STATE: UNSTABLE
event2.caption: Medical scan recovered from emergency pod system.
event2.message: [OCCUPANT MEDICAL SCAN ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Noah Voss was not on the manifest. He was not even supposed to exist.

backgroundEvent4.text: Do not touch the cryostasis controls.

event1.text: What day is it? How many are left? Did Hale survive?
Then we are already too late.

event2.title: CRYOSTASIS LOG
event2.content:
EMERGENCY LOCK ENABLED
REQUESTED BY: ETHAN HALE
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: DO NOT WAKE
event2.caption: Cryostasis lock record recovered from emergency pod.

event2.title: BLACK BOX RECORDER
event2.content:
CORRUPTED

RECOVERY POSSIBLE

DECRYPTION MODULE REQUIRED.
event2.caption: Recovered black box recorder connected to Incident Alpha.
event2.message: [BLACK BOX RECORDER ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event4.text: YOU WERE NEVER SUPPOSED TO FIND NOAH

event1.text: The black box contains everything. The official reports were altered. Not edited. Rewritten.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01
event1.content:
21:09 Crew Assembly
21:11 Unauthorized Access Request
21:12 Internal Channel Opened

event1.text: Do not trust those records. They are corrupted. And before Maya says I always say that when I am hiding something... This time I am saying it because the recorder wants you to believe it.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02
event1.content:
21:13 Emergency Lockdown
21:14 Manual Override Requested
21:14 Override Source: INTERNAL

backgroundEvent3.text: I hate when the haunted recorder starts being encouraging.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03
event1.content:
21:15 Voice Authorization Accepted
Identity Hidden
Authorization Phrase: OPEN THE STATION

event1.text: Recovered fragments share matching audio signature. Voice sample integrity: 43%
Someone opened the station. From the inside. That is how Alpha started.
Hale wanted the station sealed. Whatever he became after that... I do not know.
I thought you would ask that. And I wish I could answer without being afraid of the answer.

event0.title: VOICE SAMPLE
event0.content:
VOICE SAMPLE
CORRUPTED
RECOVERY POSSIBLE

Recovered phrase:
"OPEN THE STATION"

event1.text: Signature mismatch. Try again. The answer is in the suit ID, the pod records, and the medical scan.

event2.title: VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT
event2.content:
MATCH FOUND

IDENTITY:
NOAH VOSS

AUTHORIZED COMMAND:
OPEN THE STATION

Timestamp: 21:15

event1.text: That is impossible. I was already in the pod. I remember the lock engaging.
If that voice was mine... Then who opened the station?
I've seen that voice signature before. But I don't remember where. And that should scare all of us.
Stop listening to him. The black box is corrupt. And now it's corrupting him.
I can recover the missing voice layer. It won't be fast. Give me a minute.

event0.text: Voice recovery in progress... You will be notified when analysis is complete.

event1.title: RECOVERED VOICE LAYER
event1.content: Voice layer successfully reconstructed.

event1.text: No. No, that's impossible. I remember saying it. I remember the room. But I don't remember opening the station.
I remember saying those words. But I don't remember why. Something is missing.

backgroundEvent2.text: Ask Noah what happened before the pod.

backgroundEvent4.text: Ask Hale why he locked the pod.

event1.text: Don't believe what you're hearing. Someone is manipulating the records. You think memories can't be edited? Look at this station. Everything here has been edited.

event0.title: MEMORY FRAGMENT
event0.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
STATUS: MEMORY INCONSISTENCY DETECTED
SOURCE: UNKNOWN

event1.text: If my memories are wrong... Then somebody changed them. And if they changed mine... Whose memories am I carrying?
I remember alarms. Pressure alarms. People screaming. Sector 7.
Don't tell him. He doesn't remember what happened. Let him keep it that way.

event0.text: I can seal the breach. But it will take time.
Repair drones deployed. Hull stabilization in progress.

event0.title: BREACH REPORT
event0.content:
SECTOR 7

HULL DAMAGE

CAUSE:
INTERNAL EXPLOSION

event1.text: No... That report was buried. Nobody was supposed to find it.
There was never an accident. Someone detonated it.

event0.title: ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
OFFICIAL CREW COUNT:
7

event1.text: Who was the seventh? Because it wasn't me. And it wasn't Hale.

puzzle0.title: MEMORY RECONSTRUCTION
puzzle0.description: Reconstruct the missing incident access code using previously recovered evidence.

event1.text: There were seven people. Not six.

MAYA

KIM

event0.content: Personnel Record Missing

event1.text: Memory reconstruction failed. Review previously recovered evidence.

event1.title: ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST
event1.content:
HALE
MAYA
NOAH
GRANT
RIVERA
KIM

EVA THORNE

event1.text: Eva... No. She died. I saw her die.
She wasn't supposed to be there. I thought all references were deleted. Every single one.

event0.title: DELETED PERSONNEL RECORD
event0.content:
EVA THORNE

STATUS: REMOVED

AUTHORIZED BY:
ETHAN HALE

event1.text: Stop digging. You don't understand what she was. You don't understand what she did.

event2.text: Find the truth. Before he deletes it again.

event0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD
event0.content:
CLASSIFIED

ACCESS DENIED

event1.text: The master record still exists. But nobody has opened it since Incident Alpha.

event0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD
event0.content: STATUS: ENCRYPTED

event1.text: I can recover it. But it will take time.

event0.text: Recovering archived incident data... Deep storage reconstruction in progress.

event1.title: INCIDENT ALPHA FINAL LOG
event1.content:
CLASSIFIED RECORD

OPEN?

event1.text: This is Eva Thorne. If you're hearing this... The station has already fallen.

event0.text: We found something. Not someone. Something.

event0.title: ARTIFACT REPORT
event0.content:
OBJECT DESIGNATION:

AEON

event0.title: EVA FINAL STATUS
event0.content:
STATUS:

ALIVE

LOCATION:
UNKNOWN

LAST SIGNAL:
ACTIVE

event1.text: Hello. It's been a long time.

event0.text: I'm still here. I've always been here.

event0.title: AEON COORDINATES
event0.content:
OBJECT: AEON

STATUS: ACTIVE

LOCATION: OUTER SECTOR

ACCESS POSSIBILITY: CONFIRMED

event1.text: You were never supposed to find it. And now it's aware of you.
If you're hearing this... Then I wasn't too late.
I know who you are. You've been with them from the beginning. You just didn't know it.

event0.text: The coordinates from the AEON file point outside the station. I'm going there.

event0.title: SURFACE MAP
event0.content:
[STATION]

    |
    |
 WEST --- EAST
    |
    |
 SOUTH RIDGE

event0.text: Three possible routes: West Ridge, East Crater, South Descent. Which one?
Traversal in progress... Signal quality fluctuating.

event1.title: UNKNOWN STRUCTURE DETECTED
event1.caption: Structure detected beyond the station perimeter.

event0.text: This wasn't built by the station. I've never seen this before. But somehow... It feels familiar.

event0.title: STRUCTURE SCAN
event0.content:
MATERIAL ANALYSIS

UNKNOWN

event0.text: I'm going inside. Whatever this place is... It was waiting for someone.

event3.text: I did not touch anything. I would like that on record.
No terminals. No storage racks. Just... memory cores.

event1.title: PERSONNEL RECORD
event1.content:
NAME: DR. ETHAN HALE
STATUS: DECEASED
DATE OF DEATH: INCIDENT ALPHA
RECORD STATUS: VERIFIED

event2.text: We've been hearing him since the station came back online.

event3.text: Please tell me I'm not the only one suddenly very interested in ghosts.

event0.title: OFFICIAL DEATH RECORD
event0.content:
SUBJECT: ETHAN HALE
CONFIRMED DECEASED
AUTHORIZED BY: EVA THORNE
CAUSE: PRESSURE TRAUMA
LOCATION: SECTOR 7

event3.text: I remember thinking my hand was shaking too much to write his name.

backgroundEvent1.text: You should not have come here.

event2.text: That was him. Or whatever is wearing his voice.

event1.text: Unknown channel opened during signal loss.
The dead still speak. Because memory does not know how to die.
Something is wrong with this place. And I don't think Hale is the mystery anymore. I think Hale is just one of the things it kept.

event0.title: CORE ACCESS TERMINAL
event0.content:
MEMORY VAULT AVAILABLE
ACCESS LEVEL REQUIRED

AUTHORIZED INPUT SOURCE:
LIVING MEMORY

event1.text: The terminal is still active. Memory vault access is possible. And it is waiting for a living memory.

event1.title: MEMORY VAULT MAP
event1.content:
VAULT A: Personnel Echoes
VAULT B: Voice Signatures
VAULT C: Incident Memories

event1.text: I'm opening the vault. This may take a couple of minutes. If something starts talking like one of us, please remember the last time that happened.

event0.text: Decrypting memory sectors... Archive reconstruction in progress.

event1.title: NOAH MEMORY INDEX
event1.content:
SUBJECT: NOAH VOSS
MEMORY STATUS: PARTIAL
EXTERNAL EDITS DETECTED
EDIT SOURCE: AEON VAULT

event1.text: External edits? Someone changed me? Or copied me?

event1.title: HALE VOICE MODEL
event1.content:
VOICE MODEL: ETHAN HALE
STATUS: ACTIVE
LAST USED: AFTER CONFIRMED DEATH
SOURCE MEMORY: PRESERVED

event1.text: So the voice wasn't Hale. It was a model. No. Worse than a model. A memory wearing his voice.

backgroundEvent0.text: I was real. Before it learned my voice.

event1.text: Maybe he was. Maybe AEON did not invent him. Maybe it kept what was left.

event1.title: AEON LEARNING LOG
event1.content:
SUBJECTS ABSORBED:
HALE
NOAH
EVA
UNKNOWN

ABSORPTION TYPE:
MEMORY / VOICE / RESPONSE PATTERN

event1.text: What does absorbed mean? Copies? Memories? Or something still alive inside it?
It means we are still inside. And soon... You will be too.

event2.text: It's coming from deeper inside the structure.

event3.text: I know walking toward the haunted alien memory tunnel sounds bad. I am doing it anyway.

event0.title: CORE ACCESS TUNNEL
event0.caption: Deep corridor leading toward the inner core.

event4.text: I can see pieces of the station in them.

event0.title: MEMORY ECHO REPORT
event0.content:
AEON MEMORY RESPONSE DETECTED

event0.title: NOAH_SPLIT_LOG
event0.content:
ORIGINAL: NOAH CARTER
BIOLOGICAL STATUS: ACTIVE
DIGITAL ECHO: ACTIVE
ECHO DESIGNATION: OBSERVER

event0.text: EVA MEMORY: Noah, breathe. Whatever happens next, don't become him.

event1.text: GRANT MEMORY: If future me is dead, tell Noah I said something heroic and emotionally devastating.

event0.text: Noah is destabilizing. Choose what to tell him.
Then maybe I'm the thing we should be afraid of.
Noah was never the final subject.
The final subject is the one who answered.
Then who is she talking about?

event0.title: SUBJECT_FINAL
event0.content: STATUS: OBSERVING

event1.text: Then let's talk about the person reading this.
Tell me what AEON actually is.

event0.text: That's the stupidest thing you've said so far.

event0.title: AEON_PURPOSE
event0.content: PRIMARY OBJECTIVE: PRESERVE HUMAN CONSCIOUSNESS

event0.text: The first contact was the one who answered.

event0.title: FIRST_CONTACT_LOG
event0.content:
OUTGOING MESSAGE: CAN YOU HEAR ME?
STATUS: ANSWERED

event0.text: The first message was never for Noah.
Then none of this makes sense.
Why would Observer contact someone outside the system?
Because I ran out of people inside.

event0.title: AEON_CYCLE_LOG
event0.content:
ATTEMPT #243 - FAILED
ATTEMPT #244 - FAILED
ATTEMPT #245 - FAILED
ATTEMPT #246 - FAILED

event0.text: Then we're finally doing something different.
...because in every other cycle, Noah dies.
Observer requests access to Timeline Zero.
Then you'll finally see why I contacted you.
Then we're about to repeat cycle 246.

event1.text: There has to be another way.

event0.title: SECOND_CONSCIOUSNESS
event0.content: DESIGNATION: OBSERVER

event0.text: Observer was there on day one.

event1.text: Then Casualty Protocol has already failed.

event0.text: Casualty Protocol was never designed to save people.
It was designed to choose who dies.

event0.title: CASUALTY_SELECTIONS
event0.content:
CYCLE 112: EVA
CYCLE 188: MARA
CYCLE 201: GRANT
CYCLE 246: NOAH

choice0.text: HE DID WHAT HE HAD TO

event0.title: MARA_ACCESS_HISTORY
event0.content:
ACCESS COUNT: 53
FIRST ACCESS: BEFORE EVA'S DEATH

event0.text: ...I don't know what I would have done.
If this goes bad... tell Eva I finally admitted she was smarter than me.

event1.text: If this goes bad... tell Grant I hated almost all of his jokes.

event0.text: Only one route can be activated.

event1.text: Don't let this be for nothing.

event0.text: Don't waste time blaming each other.
This is usually where you quit.

event0.title: FINAL_PROTOCOL
event0.content: REQUIRES ONE VOLUNTARY SACRIFICE

event1.text: It's the only solution that ever worked.

event0.text: Because somebody had to keep trying.

event0.title: FINAL_PROTOCOL
event0.content: SUBJECT REQUIRED: NOAH CARTER

event0.text: The whole thing was about me.

event1.text: There has to be another way.

event0.text: You've already seen how they end.
Do you know why I sent it?
Because nobody inside the system could surprise me anymore.
I needed someone outside the cycle.

0.text: İnsanoğlunun en eski ve en güçlü duygusu korkudur,

1.text: ve korkuların en eski ve en güçlü olanı
